raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2’s left and right faces are unobstructed, and there is enough clearance in front of the tabletop for the robot to bring both end-effectors to the box’s lateral faces without colliding with surrounding objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted slightly above Box_1, freeing the top of Box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "on the table, right of box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding Box_2 and a clear area exists on the tabletop to the right of Box_1 large enough to accommodate a 30×30×30 cm box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is released and stably rests on the designated clear area of the table, no longer on top of Box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1’s lateral faces are now fully accessible and unobstructed after removing Box_2, and there is sufficient space for the robot to insert both end-effectors at the sides of Box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is firmly grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2’s left and right faces are unobstructed, and there is enough clearance in front of the tabletop for the robot to bring both end-effectors to the box’s lateral faces without colliding with surrounding objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted slightly above Box_1, freeing the top of Box_1.

parsed_json.Target: on the table, right of box_1
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding Box_2 and a clear area exists on the tabletop to the right of Box_1 large enough to accommodate a 30×30×30 cm box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is released and stably rests on the designated clear area of the table, no longer on top of Box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1’s lateral faces are now fully accessible and unobstructed after removing Box_2, and there is sufficient space for the robot to insert both end-effectors at the sides of Box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is firmly grasped between the two end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
